title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Woodland

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Woodland
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
